headline: Constellation Energy (CEG) Is Down 12.6% After EPS Surges And Buyback Completion – Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Constellation Energy recently reported past first-quarter 2026 results, with sales rising to US$11.12 billion and net income to US$1.59 billion, while completing its US$2.36 billion share repurchase program announced in 2023. The sharp improvement in earnings per share and completion of a multi-year buyback come alongside the Calpine acquisition’s contribution to growth and new long-term, carbon-free power agreements with hyperscale tech customers. We’ll now examine how this surge in...
